source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for clear English wellness UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for quiet Japanese labels, numerals, and readable form rhythm.
layout: Serene 8px grids, lily-pad surfaces, petal-tab grouping, gentle water shadows, and calm dashboard spacing.

prompts.label: Transparent water lily bloom motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Water Lily transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a pond water lily bloom botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A white water lily bloom with layered pointed petals, warm yellow center stamens, one visible round green lily pad with radial veins, subtle pond-teal reflected edges, and mud-shadow underside depth. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, floating pond-flower identity, no lotus seed pod.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include bloom and one lily pad without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no lotus pod, no pink lotus, no bouquet, no vase, no full pond landscape, no insects, no hand, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Water Lily light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Water Lily", derived from the visible pond water lily bloom cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible serene interface system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Water Lily, Water Lily Bloom, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from white petals, yellow center stamens, lily-pad greens, pond-teal reflected water, soft water surfaces, and mud-shadow depth. The board must read as water lily, not lotus, magnolia, or generic spa UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, wellness dashboard metric cards, calm line chart, progress rings, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, pond-mist backgrounds, lily-pad green primary actions, yellow-center highlights, pond-teal focus rings, petal-tab controls, lily-pad card surfaces, faint water-ripple texture.
Constraints: no lotus seed pod, no pink lotus palette, no magnolia branch, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Water Lily", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Water Lily dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Water Lily". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible pond water lily bloom cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Water Lily, Water Lily Bloom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the water lily system language: deep pond dark backgrounds, white-petal text, lily-pad green controls, yellow-center chart highlights, pond-teal focus states, mud-shadow borders, petal-tab grouping, faint water-ripple texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as water lily, not lotus, magnolia, or generic wellness.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, wellness dashboard metric cards, calm line chart, progress rings, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep pond and mud-shadow surfaces, white-petal foreground, lily-pad green active states, yellow center highlights, pond-teal rings, soft water separators, subtle ripple overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no lotus seed pod, no pink lotus palette, no magnolia branch, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Water Lily".
